A small fix for the container list.

## Fixed

- **A not-installed container that still has backups no longer shows "Last backup: Never".** (#44, thanks @manilx) When Discover rebuilds an entry from backups already in the repository, that entry has no run history, so its "Last backup" read "Never" even though snapshots clearly existed. It now falls back to the newest snapshot's actual date. (These entries appear because Discover, the disaster-recovery button, re-adds any container that still has backups in the repo so you can restore or delete them; "Delete all backups" on the entry clears it.)

---
